label: Two PS Plus checkpoints

lifecycle.afterDecision: Move fitting games to a later-play list, keep claim-only games as library memory, then hide the drop until the next checkpoint.

drops.label: Monthly games
drops.dataNeed: Lineup, claim window, platforms, region availability
drops.userAction: Claim all eligible games, then triage installs and play time.

drops.label: Catalog refresh
drops.dataNeed: Added games, leaving-soon list, tiers, region availability
drops.userAction: Find subscription games that fit taste before they disappear.

rules: Treat cadence as a product rule and exact dates as source-backed data.
Show dates only after ingestion verifies the current month.
Separate claim, install, and play-now decisions.
Prefer taste-fit subscription picks over generic catalog browsing.
After the user confirms or rejects the triage, do not keep promoting the same drop.
